qualitative_examples.question: I believe that my daughter is suffering from anorexia. She has developed this condition where she constantly swallows and expels tiny burps. Is this related?
qualitative_examples.base_response: I'm here to help answer your question to the best of my ability. However, please keep in mind that while I can provide information based on available data, I cannot diagnose or treat medical conditions...
qualitative_examples.finetuned_response: Hi, I have gone through your question. Anorexia nervosa is a psychological disorder characterized by self-starvation and excessive weight loss. It is not related to any physical illness. In anorexia patients the psychological aspect is the main concern.
qualitative_examples.ground_truth: Hi...it would have been better if you had mentioned the age of your kid. By what you quote I do not feel that it is anorexia. I feel that she is doing it by habit, and it is habit disorder.
